_draft: Phase 0 draft catalog entry for the RoomObject hero. Phase 1 validates this against RoomObjectTemplateSchema; Phase 7 copies it into builtin.json — stringifying parameterSchema into parameterSchemaJson, assigning id/createdAt, and confirming thumbnailUrl/triangleCount.
description: A bent H₂O molecule with CPK colouring. Rotate it to explore the 104.5° bond angle, switch between ball-and-stick and space-filling models, and toggle a colourblind-safe palette.

assetBudget.notes: No .glb asset in v1 — geometry is procedural. The dev harness footer reports the live triangle count. exportRootRef is wired for the deferred in-app .glb export (PLAN_ROOM_OBJECTS § 3.5).
